title.en: Retry Strategy Best Practices in Software Development
title.zh: 软件开发中的重试策略最佳实践

summary.en: A practical guide to retry boundaries, strategy selection, idempotency, and production rollout across thread pools, message queues, HTTP, and gRPC.
summary.zh: 从线程池、消息队列、HTTP 和 gRPC 四类典型场景出发，系统总结生产环境中的重试边界、策略选择、幂等要求与落地规范。

readingDirection.en: Read this when standardizing fault-tolerance policy, handling transient downstream failures, or defining an enterprise-wide retry baseline.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在设计服务容错机制、治理下游瞬时故障或统一企业级重试规范时阅读。
